attributes.description: Alerts when any connect or open operations fail (`failed_mqconn_mqconnx_total` or `failed_mqopen_total`). Auth, resource, or network issues.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] Failed connection attempts

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ failed connection attempts

### What fired
Failed MQCONN/MQCONNX/MQOPEN rates were > 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Connect/open failures block applications from reaching queues. Common causes: auth changes, network rules, or resource exhaustion on the qmgr.

### Triage
1. Check qmgr error logs (AMQERR01.LOG) for RC codes.
2. Inspect channel auth and TLS configuration.
3. Confirm qmgr resources (log, storage, max connections).

### Remediation
- Fix credentials / auth / channel config.
- Raise `MAXCHANNELS` or `MAXINST` limits.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.
